DECLARATION OF GURSON S. DANG RE: FILING OF COURT REPORTER REYES F. HUNTER'S OFFICIAL 7-PAGE TRANSCRIPT TO CLARIFY THAT THE DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF DANG'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY PROSECUTE WAS WITHOUT PREJUDICE; WHICH FACT IS NOT EVEN BARELY DECERNABLE IN THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FILED ON OCT. 31 2017 BY THE DEFENDANTS' LAWYERS BECAUSE THE FOUR HAND-WRITTEN WORDS WHICH WERE MEANT TO READ "DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE" WERE SO GROSSLY DISTORTED THAT EVEN THIS PLAINTIFF STILL HAS A PROBLEM DECIFERING THOSE FOUR WORDS HAND-WRITTEN BY THE DEFENDANTS' LAWYER FROM GORDON & REES LLP, THE NAT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANG, GURSON S.

Off calendar. Duplicate entry.

Notice Of Continuance Of Hearing Date On Motion To Dismiss Plaintffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gurson Dang(415-665-5000) for Plaintiff in Pro Per.
James Holder, Esq. (415-986-5900) of Gordon & Rees LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his views on the issue of service to Mr. Bassin within the 3 years of filing the lawsuit. Plaintiff argues, requests to dismiss without prejudice. Defendant responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative fuling with modification as follows:

DEFENDANT SCOTT BASSIN's Motion To Dismiss Plaintffs First Amended Complaint Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 583.250

Defendant Scott Bassin's motion to dismiss plaintiff's first amended complaint is granted. Mr. Bassin is dismissed from this case because he was not served with the summons and complaint within three years of the filing of this case per CCP 583.250. Plaintiff Gurson Dang fails to show any facts that support an estoppel to invoke section 583.250 or any exception to the section. Dismissal is without Prejudice.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details).

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
